ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "trim" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle */,
  "price" TEXT /* MSRP of the vehicle */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_features" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the safety feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the safety feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the safety feature (e.g., active, passive) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the safety feature */,
  "installation_cost" TEXT /* Cost of installing the safety feature */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_safety_features" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety feature */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the safety feature in the vehicle (e.g., Yes, No, Optional) */,
  "optional_cost" TEXT /* Cost if the feature is optional */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "safety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., NHTSA, IIHS) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Detailed review or comment */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_feature_ratings" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety feature */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id", "rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_feature_categories" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety feature */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the safety feature data */,
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety feature being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the safety feature data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_safety_id FOREIGN KEY ("safety_id") REFERENCES safety_features ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety feature */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the safety feature data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the safety feature data was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_safety_id FOREIGN KEY ("safety_id") REFERENCES safety_features ("safety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_versions" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the vehicle data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being changed */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_version_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_version_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_feature_version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety feature being changed */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_feature_version_history_safety_id FOREIGN KEY ("safety_id") REFERENCES safety_features ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_feature_version_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_feature_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
